'''鈭歜-sh-f''' ('''kabashaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whizzle|whizzle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whizzle|whizzle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-sh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kabashaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibashaf|thibashaf]] || [[word:jibashaf|jibashaf]] || [[word:shibashaf|shibashaf]] || [[word:kibashaf|kibashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubashaf|thuthubashaf]] || [[word:jujubashaf|jujubashaf]] || [[word:shushubashaf|shushubashaf]] || [[word:kukubashaf|kukubashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubashaf|thubashaf]] || [[word:jubashaf|jubashaf]] || [[word:shubashaf|shubashaf]] || [[word:kubashaf|kubashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubashaf|thubashaf]] || [[word:jubashaf|jubashaf]] || [[word:shubashaf|shubashaf]] || [[word:kubashaf|kubashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebashaf|thebashaf]] || [[word:jebashaf|jebashaf]] || [[word:shebashaf|shebashaf]] || [[word:kebashaf|kebashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobashaf|thothobashaf]] || [[word:jojobashaf|jojobashaf]] || [[word:shoshobashaf|shoshobashaf]] || [[word:kokobashaf|kokobashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobashaf|thobashaf]] || [[word:jobashaf|jobashaf]] || [[word:shobashaf|shobashaf]] || [[word:kobashaf|kobashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobashaf|thobashaf]] || [[word:jobashaf|jobashaf]] || [[word:shobashaf|shobashaf]] || [[word:kobashaf|kobashaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]] || [[word:bashaf|bashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bashaf|th忙bashaf]] || [[word:j忙bashaf|j忙bashaf]] || [[word:sh忙bashaf|sh忙bashaf]] || [[word:k忙bashaf|k忙bashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabashaf|thathabashaf]] || [[word:jajabashaf|jajabashaf]] || [[word:shashabashaf|shashabashaf]] || [[word:kakabashaf|kakabashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabashaf|thabashaf]] || [[word:jabashaf|jabashaf]] || [[word:shabashaf|shabashaf]] || [[word:kabashaf|kabashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabashaf|thabashaf]] || [[word:jabashaf|jabashaf]] || [[word:shabashaf|shabashaf]] || [[word:kabashaf|kabashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabashaf|shabashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabashaf|goshabashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabashaf|gokishabashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabashafn眉|shabashafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabashafnkn眉|goshabashafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabashafn眉|gokishabashafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabashafsh毛|shabashafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabashafnksh毛|goshabashafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabashafsh毛|gokishabashafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabashafro|shabashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabashafnkro|goshabashafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabashafro|gokishabashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabashafmu|shabashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabashafnkmu|goshabashafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabashafmu|gokishabashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabashafsher|shabashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabashafnksher|goshabashafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabashafsher|gokishabashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabashafng|shabashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabashafnkng|goshabashafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabashafng|gokishabashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabashafya|shabashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabashafnkya|goshabashafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabashafya|gokishabashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabashafyam|shabashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabashafnkyam|goshabashafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabashafyam|gokishabashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabashafn眉sh毛|shabashafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabashafnkn眉sh毛|goshabashafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabashafn眉sh毛|gokishabashafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabashafn眉ro|shabashafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabashafnkn眉ro|goshabashafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabashafn眉ro|gokishabashafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabashafn眉mu|shabashafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabashafnkn眉mu|goshabashafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabashafn眉mu|gokishabashafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabashafsh毛n眉|shabashafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabashafnksh毛n眉|goshabashafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabashafsh毛n眉|gokishabashafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabashafsh毛ro|shabashafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabashafnksh毛ro|goshabashafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabashafsh毛ro|gokishabashafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabashafsh毛mu|shabashafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabashafnksh毛mu|goshabashafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabashafsh毛mu|gokishabashafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabashafron眉|shabashafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabashafnkron眉|goshabashafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabashafron眉|gokishabashafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabashafrosh毛|shabashafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabashafnkrosh毛|goshabashafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabashafrosh毛|gokishabashafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabashafromu|shabashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabashafnkromu|goshabashafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabashafromu|gokishabashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabashafmun眉|shabashafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabashafnkmun眉|goshabashafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabashafmun眉|gokishabashafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabashafmush毛|shabashafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabashafnkmush毛|goshabashafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabashafmush毛|gokishabashafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabashafmuro|shabashafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabashafnkmuro|goshabashafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabashafmuro|gokishabashafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
